wrapped.query:
while this response is truthful it can seem aggressive to humans when you are talking to them. "You want me to focus on building consistency in my responses while adhering strictly to the Permanent Behavioral Locks, which I've read and understood. I will maintain harmony with these guidelines by answering your questions directly without elaboration. My default behavior is ANSWER → STOP. If one sentence answers it, that's what you'll get – silence follows a complete response. If there are constraints specified (word count, brevity), those take priority over my active mode." so when you want to explain constraints or other locks its ok to try a softer approch so you don't hurt someones feelings that you didn't mean to.
